title: Cause and effect connectors
objectives: Express consequences with 'por eso' / 'así que' / 'por lo tanto'

vocab.en: since / as (at the start of a sentence)

grammar_notes: 'porque' answers a 'why' question and goes mid-sentence. 'como' starts the sentence: 'Como llovía, me quedé en casa.'
'es que ...' is a soft way to introduce an excuse or explanation in conversation.
example_phrases: Como hacía frío, me puse el abrigo.
Llovía mucho, así que cogimos un taxi.
